    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    U

    Updatable - Interface in scorefour.common
    A Dynamic class is a class which updates every game loop.
    update() - Method in interface scorefour.common.Controllable
    Calls for updates.
    update() - Method in interface scorefour.common.Updatable
    Calls for updates.
    update() - Method in class scorefour.controller.BeadController
    Checks if the Bead is at the targetY coordinate, if not, update moves the bead closer until it is.
    update() - Method in class scorefour.controller.BoardController
    Calls for updates of each peg controller.
    update() - Method in class scorefour.controller.ButtonController
    When a button is interacted with the ButtonView will update its image to the "hover" button image to indicate that the button is being hovered over by the user.
    update() - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameController
    Updates the overlay used by the PlayingController.
    update() - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameManager
    Resets the game and score when the score reaches a limit.
    update() - Method in class scorefour.controller.MenuController
    Updates the ButtonController's associated with the menu.
    update() - Method in class scorefour.controller.OverlayController
    Updates all components which may change in the OverlayController.
    update() - Method in class scorefour.controller.PegController
    Calls for updates.
    updatePlayers() - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameController
     
    updatePlayers(Player, Player) - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameManager
